using namespace std;
int main()
{
	long long n,a,b,c,e;
	cin>>n>>a>>b>>c;
	long long d=4-n%4;
	if(d==1) e=min(a,min(b+c,c*3));
	if(d==2) e=min(b,min(a*2,c*2));
	if(d==3) e=min(a*3,min(a+b,c));
	if(d==4) e=0;
	cout<<e;
	return 0;
}","time":15,"memory":4,"problem":{"pid":"CF740A","title":"Alyona and copybooks","difficulty":2,"fullScore":100,"type":"CF"},"contest":{"id":158245,"name":"循环 + 数组比赛","startTime":1708061400,"endTime":1708155000},"sourceCodeLength":267,"submitTime":1708071302,"language":28,"user":{"uid":1024038,"name":"lin_yna","avatar":"https://cdn.luogu.com.cn/upload/usericon/1024038.png","slogan":"rp++","badge":null,"isAdmin":false,"isBanned":false,"color":"Green","ccfLevel":5,"xcpcLevel":0,"background":""},"id":147033802,"status":12,"enableO2":false},"testCaseGroup":[[0]],"showStatus":true},"currentTitle":"R147033802","currentTheme":{"id":321387,"header":{"imagePath":"https://i.loli.net/2019/05/02/5cca6b2808d2a.jpg","color":[[94,114,228,1],[130,94,228,1]],"blur":0,"brightness":0,"degree":87,"repeat":0,"position":[100,1],"size":[-1,-1],"type":1,"__CLASS_NAME":"Luogu\DataClass\User\ThemeConfig\HeaderFooterConfig"},"sideNav":{"logoBackgroundColor":[94,114,228,1],"color":[94,114,228,1],"invertColor":true,"__CLASS_NAME":"Luogu\DataClass\User\ThemeConfig\SideNavConfig"},"footer":{"imagePath":"https://i.loli.net/2019/05/02/5cca6b2808d2a.jpg","color":[[119,149,248,1],[103,114,229,1],[85,90,191,1]],"blur":0,"brightness":0,"degree":150,"repeat":0,"position":[1,100],"size":[0,0],"type":1,"__CLASS_NAME":"Luogu\DataClass\User\ThemeConfig\HeaderFooterConfig"}},"currentTime":1782188032,"currentUser":{"followingCount":99,"followerCount":41,"ranking":11089,"eloValue":1304,"blogAddress":"https://www.luogu.com.cn/blog/asos1324/","unreadMessageCount":0,"unreadNoticeCount":0,"uid":1024038,"name":"lin_yna","avatar":"https://cdn.luogu.com.cn/upload/usericon/1024038.png","slogan":"rp++","badge":null,"isAdmin":false,"isBanned":false,"color":"Green","ccfLevel":5,"xcpcLevel":0,"background":"","verified":true}}
